name: Spicy Thai Pork & Carrot Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons peanut oil or vegetable oil
2 loin chops, boneless, sliced across grain
8 ounces fresh carrots, thinly sliced diagonally
2 - 4 green and/or red hot peppers, seeded and chopped
3 tablespoons fresh ginger root, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large deep skillet over high heat until nearly smoking.
2. Add pork to the pan and let it brown without stirring for about 30 seconds.
3. Stir the pork for an additional 30 seconds, then add carrots, onion, hot peppers, and gingerroot.
4. Continue stirring occasionally over the highest heat for 6 to 8 minutes, until carrots are crisp tender and onion begins to caramelize.
5. Add 1/3 cup water to the pan and scrape loose drippings from the bottom using a spatula.
6. Stir in fish sauce until everything is completely coated.
7. Serve over hot noodles or rice. If serving with noodles, prepare them according to package directions, drain, and drizzle with a little peanut oil before transferring to an ovenproof platter. Cover with foil and keep warm on the lowest heat setting until ready to serve.
